/usr/bin/ar qc /data1/shiva/cuda_practice/ACG/lib/libopgutil.a CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/cameracontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/filescenerenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/gldisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/interactivescenerenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/statsdisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/gui/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/imagedata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/kernels/kernels.cu.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/kernels/texture.cu.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/opg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/raytracing/raytracingpipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/raytracing/shaderbindingtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/components/buffercomponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/components/bufferviewcomponent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/components/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/components/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/components/shapeinstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/properties.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/opgutil.dir/opg/scene/sceneloader.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib /data1/shiva/cuda_practice/ACG/lib/libopgutil.a
